name: Mermaid Flowchart — Styled with classDef
input: Create a styled flowchart showing data pipeline: Raw Data → Clean → Transform → Validate → Load → Analytics. Apply green styling to completed steps and orange to in-progress steps.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Flowchart with custom classDef styling distinguishing completed and in-progress steps.

data.syntax:
flowchart LR
    A[Raw Data] --> B[Clean]
    B --> C[Transform]
    C --> D[Validate]
    D --> E[Load]
    E --> F[Analytics]
    classDef done fill:#4CAF50,color:#fff
    classDef inProgress fill:#FF9800,color:#fff
    class A,B,C done
    class D,E,F inProgress
data.caption: Data pipeline flowchart with styling for completion status
